prompt: While using the Test-and-Set-Lock (TSL) instruction for mutex locks in MPs may cause system bus contention, please suggest two ways to mitigate it.
reference_answer:
(1) Read before TSL: The thread reads the lock variable normally (which can be cached). It only attempts TSL if the lock appears free.
(2) TSL with back-off: If TSL fails, the thread waits for a defined delay before retrying, reducing continuous bus lock attempts.
